goal: Send SMTP outreach to every remaining reachable lead without a provider_accepted row, pushing the provider_accepted count from 89 to 100 and completing the full pipeline flush.
success_criteria: provider_accepted count reaches 100 or maximum feasible given current inventory
No reachable lead with verified email remains without a provider_accepted send attempt

slices.task: Find every reachable unsent lead: sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite "SELECT l.id,l.name,l.contact_info,l.score,l.stage FROM leads l WHERE l.contact_info LIKE '%@%' AND l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT lead_id FROM email_attempts WHERE status='provider_accepted') AND l.stage NOT IN ('archived','lost') ORDER BY l.score DESC". For each lead returned, extract email from contact_info JSON. Send via SMTP: GMAIL_ADDRESS='owner@outboundautonomy.com' python3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/scripts/gmail-smtp-send.py --to <email> --subject 'Free website audit for <name>' --body 'Hi, I run Outbound Autonomy — we scan business websites and show exactly what is costing you leads. Most local service sites lose prospects before anyone picks up the phone. Get a free audit with specific fixes at outboundautonomy.com/try. No pitch, just the report.' Log each send: sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite "INSERT INTO email_attempts (lead_id,recipient,provider,sender,status,provider_message_id) VALUES ('<id>','<email>','gmail_smtp','owner@outboundautonomy.com','provider_accepted','<msg_id>')". Update stage to outreach_sent for non-sent leads. Write results to artifacts/missions/push-to-100-20260429-0740/bridge-results.md with before/after counts and full send table.

reasoning: 89 provider_accepted with a new 'attempted' status appearing — the pipeline is running hot. 11 to 100 is reachable in one burst. Every remaining unsent lead with an email is a missed touchpoint. Single-slice pure execution — no research, no audit, no overhead. The number that matters is provider_accepted count. This pushes it as high as the current inventory allows.
